column1: # Shell Dancer - new cards to reach full tier targets
# Existing: 6 L1 core, 1 L5 power, 1 L20 capstone (8 total)
# Adding: 6 L1 core, 2 L2, 12 L3 subclass (4 per path), 2 L5 power, 6 L9 subclass power (2 per path) = 28 new
# === L1 CORE (6 new, bringing total to 12) ===

column3: Hook a plate and wrench. The target's armor peels back, exposing a seam for the next striker.
Tap the weakest rivet. A fault spreads through the target's guard, promising a louder break later.
Passive. You read damaged plating like a map. Gain a bonus on FRAME checks to spot weak points, hidden caches, and salvageable wreckage.
Reaction. When struck, spend the momentum to slip sideways. Halve the hit and end adjacent to a different foe.
Scatter broken shell fragments at your feet. The square becomes hazardous to anyone who wants to close with you.
Slip between failures in the target's stance. Move through their square without triggering attacks.
Level-up. You've learned to wear scavenged plates like they were grown on. Gain a small permanent bonus to IRON saves while any armor you're wearing is damaged.
Level-up. Your Cascade no longer drains fully between fights; retain one point at the start of each combat.
Target a foe who swore to protect another. Your strike bypasses guards and shields; the oath itself is the weakness.
When an enemy's armor breaks, the sound travels. Nearby foes with similar gear lose a small amount of IRON until end of round.
Mark a target. Your next strike against them ignores armor entirely but costs you one Cascade.
Reaction. When you crack a foe's armor, immediately make a free strike against them before the plates finish falling.
Passive. Damage you absorb this turn becomes Cascade on the next. You pay yourself back in fractures.
Reaction. When a hit would drop you, enter Shell Step for free and remain at 1 HP until the end of the next enemy turn.
Each scar is a lesson the body remembers. Gain a stacking IRON bonus for each wound you've already taken this combat.
Root yourself in what refuses to fall. Until your next turn, you cannot be moved or knocked prone, and all incoming damage is reduced.
When a foe's armor breaks, pocket a shard. Hold up to three; each can be spent for a rider on any strike.
Lash scrap to your arm. Gain a temporary shield that absorbs one hit, then bursts into fragments hostile to the attacker.
Study what others threw away. Once per encounter, name one item or weapon type; you treat a nearby piece of broken gear as that object for one turn.
Hurl a fistful of scavenged rivets and shell-chips. Small ranged damage; each target hit loses a point of armor integrity.

column1: # === L5 POWER (2 new, bringing total to 3) ===

column3: Spend half your Cascade to crack every armored foe in melee. Their next incoming damage is amplified across the board.
You've carried so many broken shells they start to carry you. For one round, each Cascade point grants a temporary plate of scavenged armor, stacking.
Name an oath, a promise, a bond in the battlefield. Everyone tied to it takes fracture damage; if you destroy the bond, you gain Cascade equal to those harmed.
Swear aloud to end one target this round. Your strikes against them ignore all defenses. If they survive, you cannot play Breaker cards next round.
For three rounds, you cannot fall below 1 HP. When the effect ends, all stored damage lands at once on the nearest enemy instead of you.
You become the thing that does not move. Until your next turn, all allies adjacent to you share your IRON save, and attacks that would knock them down strike you instead.
Reach into the wreckage of the battle so far. Reclaim one used card of AP 2 or less from your discard pile and play it immediately at reduced cost.
Weave every shell shard you've collected this combat into a suit. Gain temporary armor equal to the number of foes you've cracked; lasts until shattered.
